death.instructions: Narrate the player feeling lost in a realm of complete darkness, and in the distance, they suddenly see a shadowy figure. The figure stands facing you for a long moment, before it begins to run towards you, reaching out as if to consume you. Right before the shadow reaches you, you awake in a cold sweat.Narrate the player character or party awakening in a different location after a near-death experience. Have an NPC be present to explain what happened to the player character or party after they lost consciousness: how they nearly died but were saved, brought to their present location and treated. Prefer mundane explanations. The character or party may have lost some or all of their possessions, which may have been looted or stolen or even taken by a trophy by a nemesis. This brush with death may leave a superficial physical mark on the characters (scars, mild deformities, etc., but not serious disabilities), and it should always have narrative consequences (for example, a loss of confidence in the player character or party's abilities), but the player character or party should be recovered to to full health and able to continue their adventure right away.
